text.title: Spec Structure Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Spec Structure.

example.scenario: A solo founder drafts a one-page spec for a billing-portal v1: 1 problem, 2 users, 3 goals, 3 non-goals, 14 numbered requirements, 8 AC (all Given/When/Then), 2 open questions; word count 612; reviewer signs off in 18 minutes.
example.trace: r1-seven-sections → r3-one-page-cap → r4-explicit-non-goals → r5-testable-ac → r6-open-questions-tracked → artefact green
